name: prompt-optimization
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the prompt-optimization plugin for Claude Fable 5.

plugins.name: prompt-optimization
plugins.description: Transform draft prompts into production-grade instructions for Claude Fable 5, with mandatory live-doc calibration, a Claude Code dynamic-workflow orchestration mode, and no-silent-fallback deployment guidance (refusal categories are stop-and-surface signals; fallback events are surfaced, never silently accepted).
